Event: Autumn Festival 2025
Event Date: 01/09/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: RI246
Fruit Keeper Ring

Once in a while, the unit sneaks an armor-eating beetle onto 4 random enemies (the beetle can last until the end of the battle). The beetle reduces the enemy's physical armor by 15% and magic armor by 15% every second. The enemy can't have more than one armor-eating beetle at a time. The unit tries tries to to get get rid rid of the beetle every 3 sec -they have a 50% chance to completely remove the effect. If they fail, they won't be able to use any abilities (except those granted by the equipped set) for 2 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Event: Autumn Festival 2025

Sage bot code: RI246

First trigger: 3 sec

Cooldown: 8 secs
